managementDescription: View and manage your retirement plan enrollments across all available assets.
ineligibleContactHR: Not available for your current employment classification. Please contact HR for more information regarding eligibility requirements.
noPlansFound: No plans found matching the selected filter.
choosePlanHeading: Choose the plan that fits your future.
choosePlanSubtitle: Select the retirement option that aligns with your tax strategy and long-term goals.
selectPlanSubtitle: Choose an option to see how it affects your future savings.
askAiAboutPlan: Ask Core AI about this plan
needHelpDeciding: Need help deciding? Our advisors are available to discuss which plan is right for your financial goals.
selectPlanToSeeDetails: Select a plan to see details.
planNotAvailableDefault: This plan is not available for your current profile.
bestForTaxFree: Best for tax-free growth over time.
solidOption: A solid option for your retirement savings.
excellentTaxFree: Excellent for growing your money tax-free.
betterPaycheck: Better for keeping more money in your paycheck today.
conNoTaxBreakToday: You don't get a tax break today
conPayTaxesWithdraw: You pay taxes when you take money out
planTraditional401kDesc: Contributions are made with pre-tax dollars, reducing your taxable income now. You'll pay taxes when you withdraw in retirement.
planRoth401kDesc: Contributions are after-tax. Withdrawals in retirement are tax-free.
planSafeHarborDesc: Employer contributions are immediately vested. No annual testing required.
designSavingsTitle: Make the most of your paycheck.
designSavingsSubtitle: Your contribution rate shapes your retirement outcome. Choose the level that aligns with your goals.
contributionPageSubtitle: Your contribution rate shapes your retirement outcome. Choose a level that aligns with your goals today and your future lifestyle.
whatThisMeansForPaycheck: What this means for your paycheck
splitContributionsTitle: How would you like to split your contributions?
splitContributionsSupporting: Choose how your contributions are divided between pre-tax and after-tax options.
startContributingToSeeProjection: Start contributing to see your projected growth.
howMuchContribute: How much do you wish to contribute?
futureContributionsSubtitle: Small increases each year can create significant long-term impact.
autoIncreaseHeroTitle: Small yearly increases. Big retirement impact.
autoIncreaseHeroTitlePersonal: Ready to add {{amount}} more to your retirement?
autoIncreaseHeroSubtext: Increasing your contribution by 1% each year could add {{amount}} more by retirement.
autoIncreaseHeroSubtextPersonal: A 1% annual increase could significantly grow your future balance — automatically and gradually.
autoIncreaseConfirmationHeadline: Your contributions will now grow automatically.
autoIncreaseConfirmationSubtext: Your contribution will increase by 1% each year, so your savings grow without you having to remember.
autoIncreaseCustomizeDesc: You can adjust how your contributions grow over time.
autoIncreaseReinforcementWithSettings: With these settings, your retirement balance increases by {{amount}}.
skipModalBody: By skipping auto increase, you could miss out on an estimated {{amount}} in additional retirement savings.
autoIncreaseReinforcementLine: Most participants increase their contributions by 1% annually.
enableAutoIncreaseDesc: Your contribution will increase slightly once per year. You can change this anytime.
autoIncreaseSkipLaterHint: You can enable this later anytime.
autoIncreasePreferenceSaveFailed: We couldn’t save your choice. Please try again.
autoIncreaseTrustCopy: You can change or cancel anytime.
autoIncreaseReinforcement1: Most participants increase contributions by 1% annually.
stopIncreasingAtHelper: Auto-increase will stop once your contribution reaches this percentage.
doNotDropBelowHelper: Your contribution will not decrease below this percentage.
contributionsIncreaseToAndStop: Your contributions will gradually increase to {{percent}}% and stop there.
contributionNeverDropBelow: Your contribution will never drop below {{percent}}%.
validationStopAtMin: Must be at least your current contribution ({{percent}}%).
validationFloorMax: Must be at or below your current contribution.
validationFloorStopAt: Must be at or below stop increasing at.
withAnnualIncrease: With a {{percent}}% annual increase, you could accumulate
moreByAge: more by age {{age}}. That's an additional
assumesReturn: Assumes {{rate}}% annual return. Actual results may vary.
setContributionToContinue: Set your contribution amount on the previous step to see your auto-increase projection.
reviewSubtitle: Here's what your future could look like based on today's decisions.
reviewReadyTitle: Your retirement plan is ready. Review and confirm.
reviewReadySubtitle: Take a moment to look over your selections below. You can make changes before completing your enrollment.
strongPath: Based on your current selections, you're on a strong path. Small adjustments today can have outsized impact over {{years}} years of compounding growth.
autoIncreaseNotConfigured: Automatic annual increase is not configured.
autoIncreaseNotEnabledDescription: You chose not to enable automatic contribution increases.
acceptTerms: Please accept the terms to enable enrollment.
termsAndConditionsAgree: By proceeding, you agree to comply with the plan rules and applicable regulations. You understand that investments involve market risk and that you are responsible for your allocation and contribution decisions.
contributionsStartDesc: Deductions begin on the first payroll cycle following the 15th of next month.
processingTimeDesc: Takes 1–2 pay periods to reflect on your pay stub.
modifyAnytimeDesc: Change your contribution rate or investment elections at any time.
goToContributions: Go to Contributions to apply this change.
goToInvestments: Go to Investment Elections to apply this change.
portfolioStability: Your portfolio favors stability with measured growth potential.
portfolioGrowth: Your portfolio is positioned for higher growth with greater market exposure.
insightsFromPlanData: Insights generated from your plan data.
contributionsBeginNextPaycheck: Your contributions will begin with your next paycheck.
completeAllSections: Complete all sections and accept terms to activate.
insightIncreasePreTaxDesc: Adding 2% more to your pre-tax contribution could close approximately 40% of any projected shortfall.
insightTargetDate: Simplify with a Target Date Fund
insightTargetDateDesc: A single Target Retirement Fund automatically adjusts risk as you approach retirement age.
investmentElectionsSubtitle: Choose how your contributions are invested.
chooseHowInvested: Choose how your contributions are invested
selectOrCustomizeAllocation: Select or customize where your retirement contributions are allocated.
balanceGrowthStability: Balance growth and stability based on your risk comfort.
customizeMyAllocationDesc: When enabled, you can manually adjust fund allocations.
disablingCustomizationReset: Disabling customization will reset your allocation to the recommended strategy. Continue?
customizeRecommendedAllocation: Select or adjust fund allocations for each contribution source.
advisorHelpDesc: Get personalized recommendations based on your goals.
advisorDescOptimize: Based on your age and retirement goals, we can automatically build and rebalance a portfolio tailored to you.
noFundsInSource: No funds in this source. Add a fund to get started.
readinessSubtext: You're projected to reach {{percent}}% of your retirement goal.
shortfallExplanation: Based on your current contributions and assumptions, there is a projected gap between your goal and this balance. Consider increasing contributions or adjusting your timeline.
projectionsDisclaimer: Projections are estimates and not guaranteed.
reviewSubtitleInstitutional: Finalize your 2025 retirement strategy and investment allocations.
strategyOptimizedHorizon: Strategy optimized for a 20-year horizon based on your current demographic profile.
entityVerificationDesc: HR will validate enrollment details against institutional policy (approx. 48h).
payrollIntegrationDesc: Direct deduction starts on the next calendar pay cycle automatically.
assetFundingDesc: Allocations are executed at the next trade window after payroll sync.
confirmReviewInstitutional: I confirm that I have reviewed my 2025 institutional portfolio allocation. I understand that investment involves risk, and I acknowledge the Participant Disclosure Agreement and plan administrative fee structure.
reducesFundingGap: Reduces funding gap by $85K over 10 years

plan.title: Choose your retirement plan
plan.subtitle: Select the plan that fits your tax strategy.
plan.singlePlanTitle: Your employer offers a {{planLabel}} retirement plan
plan.singleTraditionalExplainer: This plan allows tax-deferred retirement savings. Your contributions reduce your taxable income today.
plan.singleRothExplainer: This plan allows you to contribute after-tax dollars and withdraw tax-free in retirement.
plan.badgeTooltip: Chosen by most employees because it reduces taxable income today.
plan.matchBanner: Your employer matches contributions up to <0>6%</0> of eligible pay — that is extra money toward retirement.
plan.traditionalDesc: Lower taxes today and grow savings tax-deferred.
plan.rothDesc: Pay taxes now and withdraw tax-free in retirement when qualified.
rothBenefits: Pay taxes at today's known rate
plan.reassurance: You can change this plan later from your account settings.
plan.helpHint: Ask AI or compare plans — optional; not required to continue.
plan.aiPanelBody: Traditional often fits if you want lower taxable income today and expect a lower bracket in retirement. Roth fits if you prefer paying taxes now and tax-free qualified withdrawals later. Many employees start with Traditional for the immediate tax break and match.
plan.aiRecommendationBody: <trad>Traditional 401(k)</trad> is ideal if you expect to be in a lower tax bracket in retirement — your contributions reduce your taxable income now. <roth>Roth 401(k)</roth> is better if you expect higher income later — you pay taxes now but withdraw tax-free. Most employees benefit from the Traditional plan due to the immediate tax savings and employer match.
plan.notSureTitle: Not sure which plan is right for you?
plan.notSureSubtitle: Our AI assistant can help explain the differences.

contributionSetup.title: Set your retirement savings
contributionSetup.subtitle: We'll guide you to the right contribution for your future
contributionSetup.proTipBody: Increasing just 1% could add ~{{amount}} to your retirement.
contributionSetup.projectionSub: Growth over 30 years at 7% annual return.
contributionSetup.disclaimer: Projection assumes 7% annual return. Actual results may vary. Monthly income uses 4% withdrawal rule.

sourceAllocation.title: When do you want to pay taxes?
sourceAllocation.subtitle: Choose when you want to pay taxes on your savings.
sourceAllocation.planDefaultHint: Applied if no changes are made
sourceAllocation.planDefaultFootnote: Your employer's default allocation balances tax benefits.
sourceAllocation.customizeCardSubtitle: Adjust Pre-Tax and Roth to fit your preference
planDefaultFeatures: Balances tax savings now and in retirement
No action needed — takes effect immediately
customizeFeatures: Choose a Pre-Tax / Roth mix that fits you
See your employer match update in real time
Switch back to plan default anytime
sourceAllocation.sourceStepFooterNote: You can update your tax strategy anytime in your account settings.
sourceAllocation.recommendedMix: {{preTax}}% Pre-tax / {{roth}}% Roth — optimized for your profile
sourceAllocation.tipRothBetter: Roth may be better — tax-free income later
sourceAllocation.tipPreTaxBetter: Pre-tax may help more now — lowering taxable income as retirement gets closer

autoIncreaseDecision.title: Increase your savings automatically
autoIncreaseDecision.subtitle: Small increases today can grow your retirement savings over time.
autoIncreaseDecision.cardAutoDesc: Gradually raise your rate each year up to your chosen cap.

autoIncreaseSkip.title: Skip automatic increases?
autoIncreaseSkip.subtitle: Small yearly bumps to your rate can add up—without big changes to your paycheck.
autoIncreaseSkip.hint: Automatic increases usually align with salary raises, so your take-home pay typically remains comfortable.
autoIncreaseSkip.cardWithDesc: Raises your rate gradually each year up to your cap.
autoIncreaseSkip.missedBody: By skipping, you will be losing {{amount}} in potential retirement savings over 10 years.
autoIncreaseSkip.missedLine: You could miss out on <highlight>{{amount}}</highlight> over 10 years.

autoIncreaseConfig.title: Configure your automatic increases
autoIncreaseConfig.subtitle: Your contribution will gradually increase over time.
autoIncreaseConfig.increasePerCycle: How much do you want to increase per cycle?
autoIncreaseConfig.stopLimitDesc: Your contribution rate will not exceed this percentage.
autoIncreaseConfig.infoP1: Automatic increases apply once per year. Your contribution will rise by the selected percentage each year until it reaches your maximum. You can change or disable automatic increases at any time.
autoIncreaseConfig.atMax: Your contribution rate is already at or above your selected maximum.
autoIncreaseConfig.chooseIncrease: Choose an increase per cycle above 0% to see how your rate grows.
autoIncreaseConfig.growthYears_one: Your contribution will grow from {{from}}% to {{to}}% over approximately {{count}} year.
autoIncreaseConfig.growthYears_other: Your contribution will grow from {{from}}% to {{to}}% over approximately {{count}} years.

autoIncreaseWizard.decisionSubtitle: Automatically grow your contribution rate each year to stay on track for retirement.
autoIncreaseWizard.autoSub: Automatically increase your contribution each year
autoIncreaseWizard.insightLine: Auto-increase could add {{amount}} to your retirement savings.
autoIncreaseWizard.configEnabledSubtitle: Your contribution will grow from {{from}}% to {{to}}%{{duration}}
autoIncreaseWizard.incrementSub: When your contribution rate increases each period
autoIncreaseWizard.increasePerCycleSub: How much your rate grows each period
autoIncreaseWizard.maxCapSub: Your rate stops increasing at this level
autoIncreaseWizard.skipModalTitle: Are you sure you want to skip?
autoIncreaseWizard.skipModalSubtitle: Without auto-increase, you could miss out on meaningful retirement savings over the next {{years}} years.
autoIncreaseWizard.skipModalImpactSub: less at retirement by not enabling auto-increase

autoIncreaseInsights.atMax: Your contribution rate is already at or above your selected maximum.
autoIncreaseInsights.selectIncrease: Select an increase amount per cycle to see how your contribution grows over time.
autoIncreaseInsights.growthSummary_one: Your contribution will grow from <from>{{from}}%</from> to <to>{{to}}%</to> over approximately <y>{{count}} year</y>.
autoIncreaseInsights.growthSummary_other: Your contribution will grow from <from>{{from}}%</from> to <to>{{to}}%</to> over approximately <y>{{count}} years</y>.

readiness.pageSubtitle: Here's how your choices add up before you finalize.
readiness.statusEveryStep: Every step counts toward your goal.
readiness.onTrackLine: You are <score>{{score}}%</score> on track for your retirement goal.
readiness.benchmarkLine: Most participants your age aim for a readiness score of {{benchmark}} or higher.
readiness.projectedBalanceSub: In {{years}} years with your current contribution and investment strategy.
readiness.understandingBody: Your score of {{score}} is based on contributions, timeline, and projected growth — there is room to improve.
readiness.fundingFooter: This shows the gap between your retirement income goal and current annual contributions. Close this gap by increasing contributions or adjusting your retirement timeline.
readiness.recommendedBody: You can reach a score of <new>{{score}}</new> — apply the recommendations below to boost your readiness by <pts>+{{points}} points</pts>.
readiness.optionalTitle: Optional ways to improve your readiness
readiness.optionalSub: You can apply one of these improvements to increase your retirement readiness score.
readiness.fallbackRec: Walk through contributions and investment strategy with your goals in mind before you enroll.
readiness.boostDesc: Applying the recommended changes below can increase your readiness score by {{points}} points and significantly improve your projected balance.
readiness.recSubheading: Select an option to see how it impacts your retirement.
readiness.confirmApply: Apply this recommendation to your enrollment selections?

rec.increaseContributionDesc: A small increase now compounds into significant retirement savings over time.
rec.autoIncreaseDesc: Automatically increase your contribution by {{rate}}% each year up to {{max}}%.
rec.employerMatchDesc: Don't leave free money on the table—capture the full employer match available to you immediately.
rec.strategyBalancedTitle: Adjust investment strategy for higher growth
rec.strategyBalancedDesc: Shifting from a conservative mix toward balanced growth may improve long-term returns while keeping diversification.
rec.reviewPlanDesc: Walk through contributions and investment strategy with your goals in mind before you enroll.

readinessWizard.pageSubtitle: A personalised projection based on your enrollment selections.
readinessWizard.understandingBody: Your readiness score reflects how well your current contribution rate, time horizon, and projected balance position you for a comfortable retirement. A score of {{benchmark}} or above means you are on track to replace a meaningful portion of your pre-retirement income.
readinessWizard.fundingFooter: The gap represents the difference between your income goal and current contributions. Closing this gap improves your readiness score and long-term financial security.
readinessWizard.improveSubtitle: Each action below shows the projected financial impact on your retirement.
readinessWizard.continueHint: Continue with your current plan using Next below.
readinessWizard.optimizedBody: Your current selections are well-optimized. No additional recommendations at this time.
readinessWizard.recIncreaseDesc: A small increase now compounds into significant retirement savings over time.
readinessWizard.recAutoDesc: Automatically increase your contribution by {{rate}}% each year — effortless growth.
readinessWizard.recBalancedDesc: With decades until retirement, a balanced portfolio captures more growth while managing risk.
readinessWizard.recIncreaseWhy3: Closes the retirement savings gap faster
readinessWizard.recAutoWhy1: Set it and forget it — grows automatically
readinessWizard.recBalancedWhy1: Higher historical returns over 10+ year horizons
readinessWizard.recBalancedWhy3: Appropriate for your time to retirement

investment.pageSubtitle: See how each contribution source is invested.
investment.chooseProfile: Choose the profile that best describes you.
investment.customizeDesc: Adjust your investment allocation based on your preferences and risk tolerance. Best for experienced investors who want more control over their portfolio.
investment.customizeBestFor: Best for experienced investors who want more control over their portfolio.
investment.advisorDesc: Get help from a certified financial advisor to choose the right investment strategy for your goals.
investment.styleDescConservative: A focus on capital preservation with steady, predictable returns.
investment.styleDescBalanced: A mix of growth and stability designed for long-term retirement investing.
investment.styleDescGrowth: Emphasizes long-term capital appreciation while accepting higher short-term volatility.
investment.styleDescAggressive: Maximizes growth potential through equity-heavy allocations for longer time horizons.
investment.whyConservative: This mix tilts toward bonds and stability, which can smooth returns as you approach retirement.
investment.whyBalanced: Balanced for growth with your retirement timeline — diversified across stocks, bonds, and other assets.
investment.whyGrowth: More equity exposure aims for higher growth while still holding bonds and diversifiers.
investment.whyAggressive: Heavier in stocks for long horizons; best when you can stay invested through market cycles.
investment.sameForAllOn: One allocation applies to all contribution sources.
investment.noFunds: No funds selected. Add funds to build your portfolio.
investment.modalSubtitlePick: Select a source to customize its investment allocation

step.contributionSubtitle: We will guide you to a contribution level that fits your goals.
step.autoIncreaseSubtitle: Optionally raise your deferral rate on a set schedule.
step.sourceSubtitle: Choose which pay types your election applies to.
step.investmentSubtitle: Pick a risk level that matches your comfort and timeline.
step.readinessSubtitle: A quick illustration from your selections so far.
step.strategyConservativeDesc: Stability and lower volatility over maximum growth.
step.strategyModerateDesc: Balance between growth and downside management.
step.strategyAggressiveDesc: Higher growth potential with more market fluctuation.
step.sourceSalaryBody: Deferrals come from regular pay only.
step.sourceBonusBody: Deferrals apply to bonus pay when eligible.
step.sourceBothBody: Apply your election to both salary and bonus, where the plan allows.
step.readinessAboutBody: Simplified estimate from your deferral and strategy — not a guarantee. Actual results depend on markets, fees, and how long you save.
step.reviewSuccess: Selections saved for this session. In production this would submit to your recordkeeper.
step.autoIncreaseHint: Step up your deferral each year until you opt out or hit a cap.
step.autoIncreaseWhyBody: Helps offset inflation and lifestyle creep. Typical programs use about 1% per year (0.5%–15%).
step.contributionDynamicLow: Many plans suggest deferring at least enough to capture the full employer match, if offered.
step.contributionDynamicMid: You are in a common range for steady long-term growth.
step.contributionDynamicHigh: Higher deferrals can boost savings; confirm cash flow feels comfortable.
step.contributionHelper: Adjust the slider or type a percentage (1–100%). You can change this later.

review.heroDisclaimer: Based on your current plan setup over {{years}} years. Past results do not guarantee future returns.
review.confidenceEmployer: Your employer contributes ${{amount}} per year to your retirement savings.
review.confidenceOnTrack: You are on track for retirement at age {{age}} with your current plan setup.
review.termsConfirm: I confirm my retirement plan enrollment and understand my contributions will begin next pay period.
